title: cryptantha intermedia var. intermedia
intro: Cryptantha intermedia var. intermedia, also known as "white cryptantha", is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that grows in the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain alkaloids such as cryptanthine and intermedine, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cryptantha intermedia var. intermedia include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
